'''âg-dh-g-ng''' ('''kagadhgengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outcaper|outcaper]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-g-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outcaper|outcaper]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-dh-g-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kagadhgengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigadhgengoko|thigadhgengoko]] || [[word:jigadhgengoko|jigadhgengoko]] || [[word:shigadhgengoko|shigadhgengoko]] || [[word:kigadhgengoko|kigadhgengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
